texto: Modern man thinks he loses something — time — when he does not do things quickly
autor: yet he does not know what to do with the time he gains — except kill it.
explicacao: Citação de yet he does not know what to do with the time he gains — except kill it. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Modern man thinks he loses something — time — when he does not do things quickly” articula reflexao, erich-fromm, the-art-of-loving em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-art-of-loving.
